description: Main learning videos for understanding elapsed time: calculating how much time has passed between two events, duration of activities, and using counting strategies

videos.title: Elapsed Time for Kids | What is Elapsed Time?
videos.description: Learn what elapsed time means and how to figure out how much time has passed between two events. Use fun examples like cooking, school, and playtime to understand elapsed time!
learningObjectives: Understand what elapsed time means (time that has passed)
Calculate elapsed time between two given clock times
Apply elapsed time to real-life examples like school duration and cooking time

questions.question: School starts at 8:00 AM and ends at 2:00 PM. How many hours is that?

standard.description: For students who scored >= 80% on readiness
